examples: We had a huge jackfruit tree on our front lawn that we decorated. Once we glued white styrofoam balls to the tree, pretending they were snow.
The allergen in jackfruit does not sensitize the immune system, but once birch pollen has done so, the immune system may react to jackfruit too.
So, "durian, " a fruit specific to Southeast Asia, has been changed to a more widely understood "jackfruit."
Locals proudly declare that favourites such as tender jackfruit curry and cinnamon-spiced potato curry are among the best you will ever eat.
